div1.entryFree: Paring (cf. Cheese-paring) that which is pared off: virginity breeds mites much like a cheese; consumes itself to the very p. All's I, 1, 155. Plur. --s: some devils ask but the --s of one's nail, Err. IV, 3, 72. the very --s of our nails shall pitch a field, H6A III, 1, 102. here comes one of the --s, Lr. I, 4, 206.
